questions.question: Describe the primary function of a database management system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A database management system is responsible for storing, organizing, and managing data in a structured manner.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a relational database and a NoSQL database? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A relational database uses tables with defined relationships, while a NoSQL database uses a variety of data structures such as key-value pairs, documents, or graphs.

questions.question: Explain the concept of normalization in database design. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Normalization is the process of organizing data in a database to minimize data redundancy and dependency. It involves dividing large tables into smaller tables and linking them through relationships.
